name: Langflow
description: Build AI agents and workflows visually
compose:
name: slashnode-langflow
services:
  app:
    image: langflowai/langflow:1.10.1
    container_name: langflow-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      LANGFLOW_CONFIG_DIR: /app/langflow
      DO_NOT_TRACK: 'true'
      LANGFLOW_DATABASE_URL: postgresql://langflow:langflow@langflow-db:5432/langflow
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/app/langflow
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8862:7860
  db:
    image: postgres:16.14-trixie
    container_name: langflow-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: langflow
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: langflow
      POSTGRES_DB: langflow
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-langflow_app_data-app
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-langflow_db_data-db
